response.justification: While Bogdan has an impressive 15+ years of software engineering experience, his background is primarily in full-stack, web, and cloud development rather than embedded systems. He lacks the mandatory native-level Japanese proficiency, recent C programming experience for UNIX, and specific domain knowledge in Layer-2/Layer-3 networking, Linux kernel modification, and embedded security technologies required for this role.
strengths: Over 15 years of robust software development experience across various platforms and architectures.
Solid foundation in Linux environments, CI/CD pipelines, and DevOps practices.
Proven ability to work with systems-level languages like DLang and C/C++ in past roles.
concerns: Does not possess the required native-level Japanese language proficiency.
Missing necessary domain expertise in embedded networking (L2/L3) and switch security features (MACsec, 802.1X).
No demonstrated experience investigating or modifying the Linux kernel source code.
